title: 6X8 Photo Frame Shadow Box 20X15cm Box Frames for Crafts 3D Deep Black Bouquet Flower Case Picture Memorabilia Memory Wooden Tabletop and Wall Hanging
features: 【3D Picture Frame Deep for Objects】The size of shadow box frame is about 8" x 6" inches ,20.4x15.3 cm, with an inside depth of 3 cm,1.2 inches. And the 3D photo frames is equipped with transparent acrylic plexiglass, which is not easy to break, safe and light, dustproof.

【Standing & Hanging Shadow Boxes】Box frames with mounts can be mounted for your wall or tabletop. You can place the Shadow box frame anywhere,such as living room,playroom,children's room,coffee,hotel,restaurant and so on.

【Show Your Creativity】Unleash your imagination and creativity with our deep picture frames with mounts.You can place keepsakes, pictures, small gifts or decorative things freely in the shadow box frame, open your mind to create your unique piece of art.You can freely place pictures on tabletop or wall.

【Wide Application】This picture frames set is perfect as a gift for family members and friends on birthdays, weddings, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas, and other special occasions. Also, it be used as a menu stand or sign holder on hotels, coffee shops, weddings, or conferences.

【Ideal Gift】Shadow Frame Box with Mount is very suitable as a gift for family and friends for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, Mother's Day and other holidays.The deep picture frame is for for tabletop and wall and Ideal for any place in a room, living room, baby room or office.
